rules.description: Full Content Security Policy — allowlists self, Clarity, and Bing telemetry
rules.value: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'none'; object-src 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.clarity.ms https://c.bing.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.clarity.ms; img-src 'self' data: https://*.ytimg.com https://*.clarity.ms; style-src 'self'; manifest-src 'self'; worker-src 'self'; media-src 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests

rules.description: Set X-Frame-Options for compatibility with legacy clients
Enforce HTTPS via HTTP Strict Transport Security
